name: Fruity Cereal Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a 9-inch square pan.
2. In a large saucepan, heat the Jello (dry), corn syrup, and butter to boiling over medium heat. Stir constantly until the mixture is boiling.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the cereal until it is evenly coated.
4. Using the back of a buttered spoon, pat the mixture into the prepared pan.
5. Cover the pan with plastic wrap or foil and chill in the refrigerator until set, about 30 minutes.
6. Cut into squares.
7. Store at room temperature. Makes 3 dozen squares.
